title: SRS Protocol Definition
description: Defines a facilitation protocol: an ordered sequence of stages that guide capture of a structured Record from a source document or conversation. Each stage names the question it answers, the field(s) it contributes to, and any AI guidance for extraction. A Protocol is referenced by its UUID from a Package manifest and loaded by the engine at capture time.

$schema.description: When present, must equal the canonical schema URI. Optional — stored protocol files authored before schema enforcement may omit this field.

protocolId.description: Stable UUID for this Protocol. Never changes across versions.

protocolNamespace.description: Domain namespace the protocol belongs to (e.g. 'governance'). Used for organisation and discovery.

protocolName.description: Machine-readable name within the namespace, kebab-case or lowercase (e.g. 'decision').

protocolVersion.description: Monotonically increasing version integer within this Protocol's UUID lineage.

protocolDescription.description: Human-readable description of what this Protocol captures and when to use it. Optional.

protocolTargetType.description: UUID of the Record Type this Protocol populates. All stage contributesTo references SHOULD resolve to Fields on this Type.

protocolStages.description: Ordered sequence of capture stages. Stages SHOULD be executed in ascending order order unless dependsOn constraints require a different sequencing.

protocolTags.description: Discovery labels. Free-string tags are valid when no Vocabulary governs the key. Optional.

protocolCreatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this Protocol was first authored.

ProtocolStage.description: A single capture stage within the Protocol. additionalProperties is true to accommodate value-centric stored shapes and forward-compatible extension fields.

stageId.description: Stable UUID for this stage within the Protocol.

name.description: Human-readable stage name shown to the facilitator or AI agent.

order.description: 1-based display order. Stages with the same order value may be presented in any sequence relative to each other.

purpose.description: One-sentence description of what this stage is for. Optional.

question.description: The question this stage asks of the facilitator or source document. Optional.

completionCriteria.description: A clear statement of what 'done' looks like for this stage. Optional.

dependsOn.description: Stage UUIDs that must be completed before this stage can begin. Optional — empty array or omission means no dependency.

oneOf.description: UUID of the Field on protocolTargetType that this stage populates (compact stored form).
Structured FieldRef form (expanded form with optional typeId context).

contributesTo.description: Field(s) on the target Type that this stage populates. Items may be bare Field UUIDs (compact form) or FieldRef objects (expanded form). Optional.

aiGuidance.description: Guidance for AI-assisted extraction. May be a plain string (extraction instruction) or a structured object. Optional.

outputType.description: Expected output shape for this stage's captured value. May be a string type name or a structured schema fragment. Optional.
